title: Beginning in Bend
body:
Been a month since leaving White Salmon, WA to set out on this adventure. Still calling Washington home for now, but really the road is going to be home this spring and summer (though Alaska is always my real home, and my eventual destination this summer). 

The Alaskan winters finally got me to leave in 2022 to try something a little warmer in the region, close to fam and friends. After a stint in Portland, two stints in White Salmon (an unforgettable adventure or two on of their own), it's time to embark on an epic roadtrip with Wojo (the star and voice of this journal hereafter).

We'll be exploring the southwest, playing it by ear, and trying to save money to eventually land somewhere more permanent. We'll log our travels and experiences here as often as we can, but not too much. 

The site and our voices will evolve over time. Please reach out directly if you know me or via the anonymous form in the Wandering Wojo panel on the main page here. 

Wish us luck! Hit us up! Send suggestions, essential albums, or whatever else you think might enhance the experience. We're excited, a little nervous, but really ready to have the roadtrip of a lifetime!
